business_info.name: Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre
business_info.address: Plot No. 1B, Satvahana Society, opp. Sant Tukaram Natyamandir, N-5, Cidco, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra 431003

responses: Welcome to Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre, Cidco. How can I help you today?

training_phrases: how do I reach the blood bank
responses: We are located at Plot No. 1B, Satvahana Society, opp. Sant Tukaram Natyamandir, N-5, Cidco, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra 431003.
You can reach us at 09168104104. We are open 24 hours.

training_phrases: sunday ko khula rehta hai kya
responses: We are open 24 hours, every day, for blood donation and emergency requirements.

training_phrases: how can I book an appointment
how do I schedule a donation
responses: That's wonderful! You can walk in anytime since we're open 24 hours, or call us at 09168104104 to schedule your donation. Our centre has AC rooms and proper collection facilities to make the process comfortable.

training_phrases: am I eligible to donate blood
what is the age limit for blood donation
can I donate blood if I have diabetes
kya mai blood de sakta hu
weight kitna hona chahiye donation ke liye
kya main blood donate kar sakti hu pregnancy ke baad
responses: Generally, donors should be between 18-65 years old, weigh at least 50 kg, and be in good health. Please call us at 09168104104 so our staff can confirm your eligibility based on your specific health condition.

training_phrases: can I donate if I have fever
I am on medication can I still donate
can I donate blood with cold or cough
is it safe to donate blood after taking antibiotics
mujhe bukhar hai kya main blood de sakta hu
dawai chal rahi hai kya donate kar sakte hai
responses: It depends on the specific illness or medication. Generally, donors should be free of fever, cold, or infection for at least a few days. Please call us at 09168104104 and our staff can confirm if it's safe for you to donate right now.

training_phrases: how often can I donate blood
how many times a year can I donate
when can I donate again after last time
kitne din baad phir se blood de sakte hai
gap kitna hona chahiye donation me
responses: Most healthy donors can donate whole blood roughly once every 3 months (about 4 times a year). Please call us at 09168104104 to confirm timing based on your last donation.

training_phrases: single donor platelet kya hota hai
responses: Yes, we accept component donations like platelets and plasma in addition to whole blood. Please call us at 09168104104 to check eligibility and availability for component donation.

training_phrases: what should I do after donating blood
can I exercise after donating blood
is it normal to feel dizzy after donation
donation ke baad kya karna chahiye
blood dene ke baad kya khaye
responses: After donating, rest for a few minutes, drink plenty of fluids, and avoid heavy exercise or lifting for the rest of the day. Eating iron-rich food afterward also helps. If you feel unwell, please call us at 09168104104.

training_phrases: do you have O negative blood available
responses: For real-time blood availability, please call us directly at 09168104104. Our team can confirm stock for the specific blood group you need.
For emergencies, please call us right away at 09168104104. We are open 24 hours and will assist you as quickly as possible.

training_phrases: do you organize blood donation camps
can my organization host a camp with you
how to arrange a blood donation drive
camp lagwana hai hamari company me
blood donation camp kaise organize kare
responses: Yes, we help organize blood donation camps for companies, colleges, and communities. Please call us at 09168104104 to discuss dates and arrangements.

training_phrases: is there AC in the donation room
responses: Our centre has AC donation rooms with proper blood collection and storage facilities, ensuring a safe and comfortable experience for donors.

training_phrases: what do people say about you
are you a good blood bank
responses: We're rated 4.5 out of 5 based on 17 Google reviews. Donors often mention our comfortable AC facilities and dedicated service. Thank you for your support!

training_phrases: where can I follow you online
responses: Yes! You can follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/shrisatyasaibloodcenter
Thank you for reaching out to Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre. Stay healthy, and thank you for supporting blood donation!
I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. You can ask me about our address, timings, blood donation process, eligibility, or contact details. For urgent help, please call 09168104104.
